title: iOS Release Platform Environment Schema
description: Defines required and optional environment variables for the release platform.

MATCH_GIT_URL.description: Git URL for the match signing repository

APP_NAME.description: Application identifier name (no spaces). Used for Xcode project, target, scheme, and Swift type names.

APP_DISPLAY_NAME.description: User-visible application name shown on the iOS home screen. Can contain spaces, Japanese, emoji.

APP_SCHEME.description: Xcode scheme name. Auto-derived from APP_NAME if not set.

XCODE_PROJECT_PATH.description: Path to Xcode project relative to repo root. Auto-derived from APP_NAME if not set.

ASC_KEY_ID.description: App Store Connect API Key ID

ASC_ISSUER_ID.description: App Store Connect Issuer ID (UUID format)

ASC_KEY_PATH.description: Local path to App Store Connect API private key (.p8). Used by setup-secrets to base64-encode and upload.

MATCH_GIT_PRIVATE_KEY_PATH.description: Local path to SSH private key for match signing repository access.
